sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75222" key="o)rniqoboskei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-βοσκεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in Lat. form <sense id="n75222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ornithoboscion, aviary, poultry-house,</tr_> Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9.2</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
